name: 3gpp
description: 3GPP / ETSI house style. Clause ids look like 7.2.9.2, E.2.7, 5.3.4a, A.5 (optional single leading capital for annex letter, optional trailing lowercase letter for amendments). Cross-refs use 'clause(s)/subclause(s)/section(s) <id>', 'Annex <Letter>(.<id>)*', and '(see <id>)'.
